task_description: Fix two critical bugs (black page on menu click, line jumping on header click) and add 116 new customization settings across 6 areas: Header Layout & Structure (14), Hover Effects (15), Navigation & Typography (17), Mobile & Polish (15), Mega Menu Dropdown Styles + Open Behavior (35), and Badge Colors & Spacing (20). Priority order: bugs first, then mega menu behavior, then remaining settings.

verification.summary: All JSON schemas parse correctly. Header: 75 settings, Mega-nav: 132 settings (207 total). All 64 range settings have valid step-aligned defaults. All CSS files balanced. All JS files balanced. v2 review fixes applied: (1) heading underline gated by data-mn-col-heading-underline attribute, (2) data-hp-scroll-shrink conditionally output only when > 0, (3) data-hp-bg-opacity added to header template when < 100, (4) triple .mega-nav-column__heading blocks consolidated to one variable-driven block, (5) contained vs boxed distinction documented, (6) z-index: auto stacking context behavior documented.
